chats.text: So the budget's been... reallocated? Right. To 'synergistic growth.' Got it.
hey, you saw how that went down, right? i was literally made aware of the whole thing like 30 seconds after the decision landed. nice.
And the timeline's been compressed. Which means we're all in this, together. Forever.
the salary adjustment? i was made aware of that too. it feels like a thing that happens to other people.
So the org chart's been updated to reflect... new realities? Gotcha.
you think i'm over it, but my entire life is a series of 'i was made aware' moments. it's not even a metaphor anymore.
Did anyone else just get the memo that the Q3 projections were wrong? *gasp*
they told me to stop asking questions. right?
also the intern badge is now a permanent part of our aesthetic right?
my badge says 'Intern' but I think we're all just interns now right?
*checks badge* still says intern though lol
anyone else feeling like we're in a Zoom loop where the screen just shows us?
*mumbles something about being made aware of something*

I was made aware that this budget line item expired yesterday but management said no one's authorized to renew it and also I was told not to bring up the fact that our team hasn't received a bonus in 14 months right?
does anyone else feel like the office plants are being neglected? I was made aware someone watered them on Monday but they looked dead this morning.
okay so technically my contract ends today and the HR portal says my exit interview is scheduled for next Tuesday but i've been made aware we're operating under emergency protocols.
someone left a half-eaten bagel on my desk. I was made aware they said 'good luck with that' but i think it's just a prank.
i feel like i'm being surveilled but i've been made aware there are cameras everywhere so that makes sense right?
why do we have to clock out for lunch? I was made aware that 'break time' doesn't exist but i'm not sure if that's a feature or a bug.
does anyone know who the new HR director is? I was made aware there's a new person but nobody has introduced themselves yet so i'm asking for clarification.
I was made aware that the quarterly projections were optimistic. Like really optimistic. Right?

saw your reaction to the expense report thing... i'm told it's just 'corporate overhead' but bro we're talking actual human beings being billed for coffee. {NAME}, what do you even call that in like HR speak?
i just wanted to say thank you for the pat on the back earlier. it meant a lot in terms of morale construction.
did anyone else notice the calendar invite said 'mandatory all-hands' but nobody was told who 'they' were? i was made aware through a third party and it's giving me major bandwidth issues.
i'm putting in my request for a standing desk. the ergonomics of this chair are... not aligned with our productivity goals.
you ever get that feeling where you're like 'i am part of this company' and then you realize you have to pay for the parking? {NAME}, how do i even address that with HR?
anyone else get that 'i've been here two years' feeling? or is it just me and the overhead lights?
my boss sent a hand-written note saying 'good work this quarter' but i'm pretty sure it was printed in a font called 'cursive from hell'. do you even know what that's worth?
i think i need to restructure my understanding of 'team bonding'. the paintball incident last week still has me like...
{NAME} - quick question: when you apply for disability leave because your job is emotionally taxing... does that count as 'professional development'?
anyone else think the 'innovate or die' slogan is a little... bold? i was made aware of it at orientation and i'm still like...
